ogTitle: Valentine Plains vs Valkyrie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Valentine Plains and Valkyrie.
heading: Valentine Plains vs Valkyrie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Valentine Plains, Queensland and Valkyrie, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Valentine Plains and Valkyrie have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Valentine Plains or Valkyrie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Valentine Plains has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Valkyrie scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Valentine Plains scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Valkyrie scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Valentine Plains or Valkyrie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Valentine Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
